headline: Netflix Refocuses On Ads And AI As Acquisition Talk Cools
summary: Netflix (NasdaqGS:NFLX) is shifting focus away from a potential acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery and toward expanding its advertising, AI-driven content, and consumer products initiatives. The company is putting more emphasis on its global ad-supported tier, AI capabilities including the acquisition of Ben Affleck's InterPositive, and new consumer product categories. Netflix, with a recent share price of $89.33, is leaning into its existing scale and technology stack rather than...
